commands.name: add-migrations

options.name: --context
options.description:
Name of the DbContext to use for the migration.
Required when using the command line.

options.name: --migrationName
options.description:
Name of the migration to create. Required when using
the command line.

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.description: Adds new migrations to the DbContexts.

commands.name: apply-migrations

options.name: --context
options.description:
Name of the DbContext to use for the migration.
Required when using the command line.

options.name: --migrationName
options.description:
Name of the migration to create. Required when using
the command line.

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.description: Applies pending migrations to the local database.

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.name: list-migrations

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.description:
Lists all the DbContext together with their outstanding 
model changes, migrations, and seed data processors.

commands.name: remove-migrations

options.name: --context
options.description:
Name of the DbContext to remove the migration from.
Required when using the command line.

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.description:
Lists the last migration for each DbContext in order to 
remove it.

commands.name: reset-migrations

arguments.name: searchPath
arguments.description: Path to scan. Defaults to current directory.

commands.description: Delete all migrations and start over.
